Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-13-2023 Continued To Jul-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jack DiAna appearing via zoom for Magdalena Carnero (petitioner).

Mr. DiAna stated that they have reached a settlement agreement and is waiting for additional accounting information and will file the petition sometime next week. Status on close of estate is continued to July 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by June 27, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Continued To Jun-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report
Off Calendar Mar-08-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John DiAna, via Zoom, for Magdalena Carnero, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel reports that the main issue delaying this matter is determining the separate and community property and that the heirs had a conflict with the preceding but that the parties have reached a resolution and all heirs have signed an agreement except for one party who resides in Mexico. Counsel advises that he has had some difficulty obtaining the last signature but hopes to have the agreement finalized by the end of this month. Counsel confirms that the Parnassus stocks have sold and that his client has advised that the cash assets are held in two separate, fully insured accounts and that the IRS claim has been paid. The court directs counsel to file of the preceding and to clear all the Examiner's notes. The court and counsel discuss the option of a small estate affidavit if the assets are separate property. Counsel admits that the preceding may be problematic for his client but acknowledges the court's suggestion. After additional discussion, the court advises counsel that it is inclined to take the instant petition off calendar and set a new status hearing on the filing of a petition for final distribution or new petition for approval of status of administration. Counsel agrees with the court's tentative ruling.

The First Report of Status of Administration is taken off calendar. A new status on close of estate is set for May-17-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a petition by May-10-2023.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report
Off Calendar Nov-16-2022 Continued To Dec-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-02-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Continued To Aug-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John DiAna, via Zoom, for Magdalena Carnero, Administrator.

The court advises counsel that he needs to file a fully noticed petition. Counsel offers an update regarding the status of this matter and advises of misunderstanding the Examiner's notes. Counsel advises that he can file a status petition and that he intended to file Petition for Final Distribution by the end of this year. The court advises counsel that the Beneficiaries are entitled to be advised as to the status of the estate.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Aug-02-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is advised that if a petition is filed on or before Jul-26-2022 an appearance will not be required.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Duong. Not Reported.
